selection_reason: Owner asked for a more beautiful and more detailed Codex-generated image. Option 08 uses the recovered Codex-generated key-art background and keeps exact project-rendered text and legal motifs for reliability.

options.assessment: Most case-specific; good for legal-history viewers, less emotional than option 01.
